## Summary

Track C self-chain resume was using the soft `invocationBudgetMs` (240s − 15s safety = 225s) as its timeout. For 109K-word manuscripts, the synthesis LLM call genuinely takes longer than 225s, causing infinite self-chain loops at exactly 225001ms — Track C never completes.

Switches to the Vercel `maxDuration` hard ceiling (800s − 20s safety = 780s) for the Track C self-chain resume path. Track C runs alone in this code path (all chunks are already complete), so it can safely use the full function duration.

## Scope

- **Changed**: `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` — Track C self-chain resume budget calculation (line ~6840)
- **Not touched**: Phase 1A chunk batch budget, Track C first-attempt budget (after batch), any other pipeline logic

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Low risk: only changes the timeout ceiling for an already-isolated code path (Track C runs alone, no concurrent chunk processing)
- If the LLM call takes >780s, it will still self-chain — but 780s should be sufficient for even the largest manuscripts
- No behavioral change for manuscripts that complete Track C within 225s

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this IS the pipeline fix (Track C budget ceiling)
